docket_entries.description: DISCOVERY 610, CLAIMANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS #1 -- NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. CLAIMANT'S MOTION IS GRANTED. RESPONDENT SHALL SERVE COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS AN ABUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $636.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. (610/BCHAN)
